criteria.name: empty_states_present_everywhere
criteria.description: Empty states render where the spec calls for them: a no-match portfolio filter shows an empty state naming the active filters with a Clear filters control, a timeline filtered to an empty event kind shows an empty state message, and a READY bundle with no fix items states that no fixes are required
criteria.reasoning: All required empty states were observed, including active-filter no-match messaging, empty timeline messaging, and READY bundle no-fixes messaging. Evidence: empty_states_present_everywhere-shared.png

criteria.name: override_form_validates_inline
criteria.description: The override justification form validates inline before saving: an empty, under-20-character, or whitespace-only justification shows a message naming the justification field and saves nothing
criteria.reasoning: Empty and short justifications showed the field-specific minimum-length validation before saving. Evidence: actions_show_confirmation-shared.png

criteria.name: errors_are_actionable
criteria.description: Validation and locked-state messages are actionable: the justification error states the minimum length, and a locked step's notice names the step that must be finished first
criteria.reasoning: Errors named the justification field and minimum length; locked Bundle messaging named Verdict as the prerequisite. Evidence: actions_show_confirmation-shared.png

criteria.name: actions_show_confirmation
criteria.description: Copying the summary, copying or downloading an export, completing bundling, saving an override, importing a package, and a re-run finishing each produce a visible confirmation (toast, badge change, or timeline entry)
criteria.reasoning: Confirmation statuses were observed for saves, bundling, copy/download, valid import, and re-run completion. Evidence: actions_show_confirmation-shared.png

criteria.name: rerun_shows_progress_affordances
criteria.description: The simulated re-run shows deliberate progress affordances throughout: pending/running step indicators, the backoff countdown while retrying, and a completing publish step — never a frozen or blank region while work is simulated
criteria.reasoning: During re-run, pending/running states and the publish sequence were visibly present. Evidence: rerun_shows_progress_affordances-shared.png

criteria.name: destructive_or_reverting_actions_are_guarded
criteria.description: Reverting actions behave safely: turning the override toggle off with an out-of-set recommendation saved reverts to unset with the Override badge removed, and un-marking Verdict after bundling re-locks Bundle while the timeline keeps the historical bundling event
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: disabling an override reverted correctly, but un-marking Verdict after bundling left Bundle marked Done and accessible instead of re-locking it; historical events remained. Evidence: destructive_or_reverting_actions_are_guarded-shared.png

criteria.name: double_activation_is_idempotent
criteria.description: Rapidly double-activating Re-run gate starts exactly one re-run, and activating it while that gate's re-run is running leaves the running re-run untouched instead of restarting it
criteria.reasoning: A rapid double activation produced one visible running sequence with one running step and no duplicate restart. Evidence: double_activation_is_idempotent-shared.png

criteria.name: self_diff_prevented
criteria.description: In trial diff mode the second picker excludes the already-picked trial or shows an inline message, and no self-diff of a trial against itself renders
criteria.reasoning: Selecting the same trial produced the inline message “Choose two different trials.” and no self-diff rendered. Evidence: actions_show_confirmation-shared.png

criteria.name: long_text_handled

criteria.reasoning: FAIL: the long fix title truncated and expanded to full text, but no scroll-contained long reasoning/answer pane was observed. Evidence: destructive_or_reverting_actions_are_guarded-shared.png

criteria.name: overlays_close_all_paths
criteria.description: Overlay surfaces (override form, diff picker, export drawer, import surface, confirmations) close via their close control, the Escape key, and — where a dimmed backdrop exists — a backdrop click, without saving partial state
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: close controls and Escape were tested, but backdrop-click dismissal was not directly exercised for a dimmed overlay. Evidence: overlays_close_all_paths-shared.png

criteria.name: import_field_contract_rejects_invalid
criteria.description: Importing malformed Review Package JSON or a document that breaks the field contract (wrong schemaVersion, missing required keys, closed-set violations, negative trial counts) shows an inline import error naming the problem, leaves bundle counts and session facets unchanged, and does not refresh the Export preview as a success
criteria.reasoning: Malformed import JSON showed schemaVersion/contract errors without changing the bundle counts or session facets. Evidence: import_field_contract_rejects_invalid-shared.png
